message:
feat(testing): add revocation timing integration tests [MOR/C1.6]

10 integration tests proving bounded enforcement across the full C1.x
revocation pipeline: issue-use-revoke-reject, TOCTOU seal detection,
3-node mesh propagation, degraded-mode SLA enforcement, freshness class
policy, priority push wire format, 10K zero false positives, immediate
enforcement window, SLA boundary precision, policy interval comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
